---
title: "Wadmilson Costa da Fonseca e CRUZ"
image: "carlinho.jpg"
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/Wadmilson/relatorio-estprob/"
  - label: Email
    url: "ecruzcarlinho@aluno.ufsj.edu.br"
  - label: Relatórios
    url: "./relatorio/index.html"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
Aluno de Engenharia Mecatronica da UFSJ/CAP!
